title: FIREWORKS RETURN
topic: Fundraiser for Mad Anthony’s Big Boom Fireworks Extravaganza takes place on Wednesday, July 3rd
author: DON LIVELY

title: City gets $2.5 million infrastructure grant
topic: The City of Waynesboro has been awarded $2,496,190 in OneGeorgia funds to construct street, drainage, water, and sewer infrastructure that will allow for the construction of 51 new housing units in St. George Crossing.
notes: The development is on a 190-acre tract just off West Sixth Street across from the Burke County Office Park. The first phase will allow for the construction of 27 single-family homes and 24 townhomes. Future phases will include single family homes at various price points.
author: Roy F. Chalker Jr.

title: Groundbreaking planned for new development
topic: A groundbreaking scheduled for March 17 marks the official start of construction at St. George Crossing.
notes: Developer Mike Abebe stated the development had been in planning for over five years.
author: No Author Listed

title: $300 million project proposed for 6th Street property
topic: Mike Abebe proposed a $300 million project tied to a 190-acre parcel in Waynesboro.
author: SHELLIE SMITLEY

title: City receives $1 million federal grant
topic: The City of Waynesboro received a $1 million federal grant for sewer infrastructure improvements.
notes: Mayor James 'Chick' Jones stated the funding supports long-term infrastructure resilience.
author: No Author Listed

title: Developer breaks ground on new neighborhood
topic: Groundbreaking ceremony held for St. George Crossing development.
notes: Article includes comments from Mike Abebe and Assistant City Manager Trinetta Skinner.
author: No Author Listed
